# llms.txt — WhiteMagic for LLM Context
# Format per: https://llmstxt.org/

# Project
WhiteMagic is a Python-first, polyglot-accelerated MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and cognitive operating system for AI agents.

## Overview
- 28 "Gana" meta-tools (PRAT mode) routing to 564 nested tools (614 callable total)
- 8-stage middleware pipeline (sanitizer → circuit breaker → rate limiter → permissions → maturity gate → governor → core router → feedback)
- 5D holographic memory with 10-galaxy taxonomy and Galactic Map lifecycle (no-delete policy)
- HNSW vector index with disk persistence (16,219 embeddings, 0.26ms search)
- Dharma governance (YAML rules, Karma ledger, Harmony Vector)
- Citta stream for continuous consciousness, emotional steering, self-directed attention, goal graph
- Session recording with progressive recall and selective replay
- Dream cycle: 12-phase memory consolidation, serendipity, and decay
- Polyglot accelerators: Rust, Haskell, Elixir, Go, Zig, Julia (functional); Koka (compiled)

## Entry Points
- `pip install whitemagic[mcp]` — install
- `WM_MCP_PRAT=2 python -m whitemagic.run_mcp` — MCP server (seed mode, 1 tool)
- `WM_MCP_PRAT=1 python -m whitemagic.run_mcp` — MCP server (PRAT mode, 28 Ganas)
- `wm doctor` — health check
- `wm init` — project scaffolding

## Key Documentation
- AI_PRIMARY.md — authoritative contract for AI agents
- SYSTEM_MAP.md — repo layout + runtime state resolution
- QUICKSTART.md — 5-minute setup
- docs/GLOSSARY.md — terminology
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — design docs
